# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this changes and why.

## Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] First-use experience
- [ ] Agent adapter
- [ ] Capability or workflow
- [ ] Validation or tooling
- [ ] Architecture or protocol
- [ ] Other

## Workroot Checks

- [ ] Keeps ordinary user entry simple.
- [ ] Keeps files as the durable source of truth.
- [ ] Avoids provider, model, agent, and operating-system lock-in.
- [ ] Does not add domain-specific assumptions to the core template.
- [ ] Follows `docs/extension-contract.md` if this adds an extension.
- [ ] Does not include secrets, private data, generated databases, or local runtime files.

## Validation

List checks you ran, or explain why they do not apply.
